title: Utan Heat Wave
lead: Utan is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.69. The city's temperature is extremely high, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Utan is causing extremely hot conditions, with a CDD of 11.9 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 67%, and the wind speed is 3.2 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The lack of cooling degree days, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, indicates that the heat wave is expected to persist.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
